description: Issue #205 Cat 7: Arabic CID TrueType font support

userStories.title: Support Arabic CID TrueType font character extraction
userStories.description: pdfjs/ArabicCIDTrueType.pdf contains Arabic text using a CID-based TrueType font. Character extraction fails at 0% because the font uses Arabic Presentation Forms (U+FE70-U+FEFF) and requires proper CID→Unicode resolution for Arabic glyphs. The existing BiDi support (issue #185) handles text reordering but not CID-based Arabic font glyph resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Arabic Presentation Forms (U+FE70-U+FEFF) are handled in ToUnicode mapping
CID→Unicode resolution works for Arabic CID TrueType fonts
No regression on existing BiDi/Arabic PDFs (BidiSample.pdf stays at 100%)
userStories.notes: Key files: crates/pdfplumber-parse/src/cid_font.rs, crates/pdfplumber-parse/src/cmap.rs. ArabicCIDTrueType.pdf likely has a TrueType font with CID-keyed glyph access and a ToUnicode CMap that maps to Arabic Presentation Forms. The challenge is: 1) Correctly parsing the CIDToGIDMap (maps CIDs to TrueType glyph IDs), 2) Using ToUnicode CMap for Unicode resolution, 3) Handling Arabic contextual forms. Note: full glyph shaping (HarfBuzz-like) is NOT required - just correct Unicode character extraction from the existing CID→Unicode path.
